shortDescription: Family-friendly 4-bedroom townhouse in Dufferin Grove with open-plan living and private patio.
fullDescription: Welcome to 68 Gladstone Avenue in the vibrant Dufferin Grove neighbourhood. This stylish multi-level townhouse provides the space of a house with the convenience of condo living. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen features modern finishes including a gas range, integrated dishwasher, and pantry storage. Upstairs, 4 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. The finished lower level adds valuable living space with a recreation room, extra bathroom, and storage. Transit, cycling infrastructure, and the best of Toronto’s cultural scene are right at your doorstep.
keyFeatures: Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
Surrounded by cafes, galleries, and boutiques
